flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Francis Tuttle Technology Center fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (35.3% → 20.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Francis Tuttle Technology Center fell 42% between 2021 and 2024 (70.0% → 40.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Francis Tuttle Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (825 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Francis Tuttle Technology Center fell 39% between 2011 and 2014 ($6.9k → $4.2k).
